title: PwD - View Product Pricing and Vendor Information - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-80: PwD - View Product Pricing and Vendor Information. Validates product price display, placeholder text when price is unavailable, Contact Vendor button opening a popup with vendor name, logo, phone, email, address, and website. Also validates dialog behavior, keyboard operability, focus management, and responsive layout.

testCases.title: Product price is visible on the product details page
steps: Log in and navigate to a product details page.
Verify the price element is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in and on a product details page.
expectedResults: Price element is visible.

testCases.title: Price is displayed below the product name
steps: Navigate to a product details page.
Compare vertical position of product name and price elements.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Price is positioned below the product name.

testCases.title: Price includes proper currency symbol (₹)
steps: Navigate to a product details page.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Price includes ₹ currency symbol.

testCases.title: Placeholder text shown when price is unavailable
steps: Navigate to a product that has no price set.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product with no price set.
expectedResults: Placeholder text is displayed instead of price.

testCases.title: Contact Vendor button is visible on product details page
steps: Navigate to a product details page.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: 'Contact Vendor' button is visible.

testCases.title: Clicking Contact Vendor opens the vendor popup
steps: Navigate to a product details page.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Clicking 'Contact Vendor' opens the vendor popup.

testCases.title: Contact Vendor button is keyboard-focusable and activatable via Enter
steps: Tab to the Contact Vendor button.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Contact Vendor button is focusable via Tab and activatable via Enter.

testCases.title: Opening popup does not cause page navigation or reload
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: URL does not change when popup opens.

testCases.title: Vendor popup displays vendor name
expectedResults: Vendor name is visible in the popup.

testCases.title: Vendor popup displays vendor logo when available
expectedResults: Vendor logo image is present when available.

testCases.title: Vendor popup displays phone number(s)
steps: Verify phone number text is visible.
expectedResults: Phone number text is visible.

testCases.title: Phone number is rendered as tel: link
steps: Verify phone is an <a href='tel:'> link.
expectedResults: Phone is rendered as a tel: link.

testCases.title: Vendor popup displays email address
expectedResults: Email address text is visible.

testCases.title: Email is rendered as mailto: link
steps: Verify email is an <a href='mailto:'> link.
expectedResults: Email is rendered as a mailto: link.

testCases.title: Vendor popup displays vendor address
expectedResults: Vendor address text is visible.

testCases.title: Vendor popup displays vendor website link
steps: Verify website link is present with valid href.
expectedResults: Website link is present with valid href.

testCases.title: Vendor popup has a visible title
expectedResults: Popup title/heading is visible.

testCases.title: Popup renders as a dialog element
steps: Inspect the popup container for role attribute.
expectedResults: Popup container has dialog role.

testCases.title: Popup behaves as a modal overlay
steps: Verify it has aria-modal='true' or is a native <dialog>.
expectedResults: Popup has aria-modal='true' or is a native dialog.

testCases.title: Dialog content uses paragraphs and links
steps:
Verify

and elements exist inside dialog.
expectedResults: Dialog content contains paragraphs and links.

testCases.title: Dialog has a close mechanism
expectedResults: Close link/button is present.

testCases.title: Focus moves inside dialog on open
steps: Click Contact Vendor to open popup.
expectedResults: Focus moves inside the dialog on open.

testCases.title: Tab key cycles within dialog without escaping
expectedResults: Tab key cycles within dialog without escaping.

testCases.title: Pressing Esc closes the dialog
expectedResults: Pressing Esc closes the dialog.

testCases.title: Focus returns to Contact Vendor button after dialog closes
testCases.preconditions: Vendor popup was open and closed.
expectedResults: Focus returns to Contact Vendor button.

testCases.title: All links inside dialog are reachable via Tab
expectedResults: All links inside dialog are reachable via Tab.

testCases.title: Focus indicators are visible on interactive elements
steps: Verify outline or box-shadow is visible.
expectedResults: Focus indicators are visible on interactive elements.

testCases.title: Background page is non-interactive while popup is open
expectedResults: Background page is non-interactive.

testCases.title: Dialog fits within mobile viewport without clipping
expectedResults: Dialog fits within mobile viewport without clipping.

testCases.title: Close control has non-zero dimensions
expectedResults: Close control has non-zero dimensions.

testCases.title: Close control remains visible at small viewport
expectedResults: Close control remains visible at small viewport.

testCases.title: Dialog scrolls internally when content exceeds viewport
steps: Verify vendor name is still readable.
expectedResults: Dialog scrolls internally when content exceeds viewport.

testCases.title: Vendor popup can be reopened after closing
expectedResults: Vendor popup can be reopened and content is visible.
